hero.hero_overview:
I believe this hero is still misunderstood as an atk speed built hero from pre revamp. 
Think of the lore. This hero is the strongest ninja and the villain to Hayabusa. They both need to apply stacks of marks but execute skill oppositely. Hayabusa multi-hits while Hanzo builts up for that juicy bite.
hero.hero_strength: Can dive and execute backline heroes. Can kill tanks who underestimate his lategame damage.
hero.hero_weakness: Once you miss your 2nd skill and no stacks for your 1st skill, your ghost form can be easily killed. Be mindful of sneaky assasins and roamers hunting and waiting for you to return to you original body.

equips.equip_desc: Trinity build to Stack up your passive quickly and burst them with your first skill and demon shoes for extra energy for every kill and immortality for outplays.

hero.hero_overview: Hanzo Trinity Build with Malefic gun and demon shoes, start at your red buff and use your first skill ASAP, then farm the rock golem and use your retribution on it, after that run to your blue buff and use your first skill on the big boi then kill the smaller creep and use retribution again on Horned lizard, if you've done it correctly you should almost be level 4 and have enough time to run to your enemy beatle camp to use your first skill and delay them from hitting level 4
hero.hero_strength: Quick farming, easy buff stealing, low risk when joining teamfights, fast burst potential, good retribution setup and quick rotations
hero.hero_weakness: Extremely squishy, vulnerable without ult

dominants.dominant_desc: Hanzo sebenarnya memiliki kemampuan cepat dalam farming sebelum level 4 Hanzo wajib mengeliminasi buff biru dan merah sehingga pada saat war di offlaner tim Hanzo memiliki buff tambahan dan mampu mengeliminasi atau first blood lawan. Sebelum level 8 atau dalam mid game Hanzo wajib turtle karena dia cepat dalam hal Farming dan di menit 10 sudah lord dan sudah end game.
dominants.dominant_title: Fast End Early game sebelum level 4 dan  sebelum level 8

dominants.dominant_desc: Saat berada di offlaner Hanzo harus membuat exp Lane lawan menjadi miskin gold dan kalah level dengan cara mengeliminasi kelomang exp dan jangan membuat exp lawan kaya gold. Semakin cepat Hanzo jadi di mid game maka lawan kesulitan mengalahkannya dan jangan lupa untuk mencuri buff lawan saat exp lawan sedang sibuk push Minion untuk tambahan exp mereka

Pada saat ingin menggunakan Hanzo sebagai roam maka yg dilakukan adalah mencuri buff lawan sehingga lawan itu kesulitan untuk mendapatkan tambahan buff gold dan level sehingga jika lawan kalah gold dan level maka kemenangan tim pasti akan cepat menang.

emblems.emblem_desc: Ini rekomendasi emblem yang mampu mengurangi resiko kalah farming dan memiliki damage burst secara terus menerus. Rupture merupakan emblem tambahan yg mampu mempenetrasi lawan sehingga jika lawan dengan hp tinggi bisa sedikit di cicil menggunakan rupture, Seasoned Hunter ini emblem khusus untuk farming memudahkan dan mempercepat farming di lord atau turtle bahkan pada saat kontes lord atau turtle emblem ini mampu fast dalam mengeliminasi lord atau turtle, dan emblem utama yaitu Lethal ignition ini merupakan emblem terkenal karena setiap menggunakan skill ke musuh sebanyak 3× dengan burst tinggi maka akan menyebabkan efek burn atau membakar lawan sehingga memperkuat burst Hero tersebut dan mampu membakar lawan secara terus menerus tanpa membeli item magic glowing wand.
Jika Hero ini ditempatkan di ofllaner biasanya menggunakan emblem ini fatal dan festival blood adalah emblem pembantu mendapatkan spell vamp dan war cry cocok seklai untuk burst tambahan Hero ini.
Jika Hero ini ditempatkan di roam maka harus menggunakan emblem tank karena Hero ini sangat tipis sekali dan mengurangi dampak kekalahan tim
Ini merupakan emblem roam Hanzo quantum charge yg terus mengheal setiap 8 detik dan tambahan movement speed emblem tambahan lain jg bisa memperkuat burst dari Hanzo

equips.equip_desc: Build ini cocok untuk hyper Hanzo. Dengan equipment utama nya Blood of despair dan sky piercer itu merupakan 2 equipment utama karena sangat mengerikan dan sakit saat kedua equipment itu dibeli bahkan jika stak dari sky piercer mencapai 80 atau stak maksimum maka musuh akan cepat tereliminasi. Haas claws adalah equipment life steel yg mampu membuat Hanzo kuat dan bertahan lama di gabung dnegan sea helberd maka life steel musuh akan dikurangi setengahnya. Hunter strike juga mempercepat Hanzo dalam farming dan mengeliminasi musuh dan mendapatkan movement speed tambahan sehingga Hanzo sulit ditangkap

Ini merupakan equipment offlaner Hanzo terkuat memiliki daya tahan yang lama dan damage yg sangat sakit sehingga dengan sekali burst dari efek sky piercer stak maximum+ blade of despair damage tinggi+ war axe maka Hanzo memiliki damage yg sangat tinggi, windtalker+barseker+Haas claws ini item populer marksman namun jika dipasangkan di Hanzo maka damage nya akan berkali kali lipat sakit.

Ini merupakan equipment roam Hanzo 1.0 Ter efektif dan mampu membuat Hanzo tahan lama dalam membantu tim dalam war ..Haas claws dan war axe kedua equipment pertama yg memberikan damage dan thunder belt memberikan defense Athena mampu menahan magic damage serta immortal membuat Hanzo bisa hidup kembali

Ini merupakan equipment roam Hanzo 2.0 item utama Haas wind talker dan sea helber membuat attack speed Hanzo kencang dan life steel kencang sehingga membuat dia tak terkalahkan dan brute force serta immortal membuat Hanzo sedikit bisa bertahan dari damage Hero lawan

hero.hero_overview: Hero ini biasanya unggul pada early atau awal pertandingan sampai mid atau pertengahan game. Hero ini mampu menge burst musuh sehingga cocok untuk melawan musuh dengan Hp atau nyawa yang tipis2. Selain cepat dalam hal Farming Hero ini juga sulit sekali untuk ditangkap setelah revamp dan dengan damage burst yang tinggi sehingga musuh sulit kabur saat Hero ini menggunakan skill skill nya.
hero.hero_strength: Dalam laning dan Farming Hero ini sangat cepat sehingga mampu mengejar level dari hyper lawan. Di early game memiliki banyak sekali keuntungan terutama bisa kill Hero dengan Hp tipis seperti mage atau marksman sehingga tim sendiri memiliki banyak keuntungan untuk push turret. Di mid game Hero ini bisa mencapai level max sehingga menyulitkan musuh untuk mendapatkan buff atau kill atau mengejar ketertinggalannya dalam push turret. Sama seperti Hero burst lainnya Hero ini juga sulit untuk lawan kabur sehingga dengan sekali serangan maka lawan dengan hp yang tipis akan cepat mati.
hero.hero_weakness: Sayangnya pada saat farming jika Hero ini diganggu roam musuh pada early game maka Hero ini akan sulit jg mendapatkan buff sehingga menjadi tertinggal level dengan hyper lawan. Di late game Hero ini sangat lemah karena musuh sudah menjadi lebih kuat sehingga jika dibawa sampai late game Hero ini akan menjadi sulit untuk mengcounteur mage atau marksman. Jika Hero ini tertinggal gold dan level maka berkebalikan akan menjadi sangat mudah lawan untuk mencapai kemenangan

hero.hero_overview: Hanzo is an Assassin in Mobile Legends with high burst damage and mobility. His passive, Ame no Habakiri, collects Demon Blood from slain enemies. Skill 1 (Demon Feast) instantly devours jungle monsters for energy. Skill 2 (Soul Reap) deals AoE damage and generates Demon Blood. His Ultimate (Pinnacle Ninja) lets him separate his soul from his body, attacking enemies from a distance while his real body remains hidden. Hanzo excels at ambushing and eliminating squishy targets but is vulnerable if his real body is found. He requires strategic positioning and timing to dominate the battlefield.
hero.hero_strength: Hanzo is a deadly assassin in Mobile Legends with high burst damage and long-range attacks. His Ultimate (Pinnacle Ninja) lets him separate his soul, attacking from a distance while his real body remains hidden. He farms quickly with Demon Feast, instantly consuming jungle monsters. His Soul Reap deals AoE damage, making him effective in fights. In Demon form, he gains increased attack speed and mobility, making him a strong chaser. Hanzo excels at assassinating squishy targets and split-pushing. However, he is vulnerable if enemies find his real body, requiring smart positioning and map awareness to dominate the game.
hero.hero_weakness: Revamped Hanzo still has key weaknesses. While his Ultimate (Pinnacle Ninja) makes his body untargetable, his energy drains quickly, limiting his time in demon form. If caught without energy, he becomes vulnerable. His Skill 1 (Demon Feast) requires five stacks to activate, making it harder to execute without proper setup. Crowd control (CC) effects can still disrupt his attacks, forcing him out of fights early. He struggles against heroes with high mobility or anti-burst abilities. Additionally, while his revamp improves survivability, poor positioning or mistimed skills can leave him exposed, making smart play essential to mastering him.

data.recommend: To improve your Hanzo guide, start with a brief introduction about his role as an Assassin and his strengths, like burst damage and mobility. Compatibility and counter.

spell.spell_desc: Retribution is a Battle Spell in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, mainly used by junglers. It deals true damage to jungle monsters and minions, helping heroes farm faster. After purchasing a Jungle item, Retribution upgrades into one of three enhanced versions: Ice Retribution (steals movement speed), Flame Retribution (steals attack power), or Bloody Retribution (lifesteal). It also reduces jungle creep damage taken and grants extra gold and experience. Retribution is crucial for securing objectives like Turtle and Lord. However, using it incorrectly or getting invaded can slow farming, making it important to time its use effectively in battles.

hero.hero_overview: Hanzo is a hero who is difficult to play for beginners who are just getting to know him. With 6 complex skills, new players will have difficulty mastering Hanzo. It takes a fair amount of time and practice to fully understand this hero's abilities and mechanics.
hero.hero_strength:
Hanzo ML Strengths
Confusing Shadow Skill
Hanzo has shadows that is guaranteed to confuse his enemies. To face Hanzo, the enemy must first know where the real Hanzo is, or their efforts will be in vain. Hanzo's shadow skills can also be used to attack enemies from various directions, making him more than just a shadow.

Lots of Great Skills
Hanzo is an Assassin with many skills, namely 6 skills that can be used. This strength makes him very strong both at the start of the game and when the game enters the late game. Hanzo is one of the heroes who is able to become the hero of his team.

Long attack distance
One of Hanzo's strengths is that he has a fairly long attack distance. This allows him to defeat enemies from a distance, maintain a safe distance, and deal damage to enemies before they get close.

High Burst Damage 
Hanzo can deal high burst damage to his enemies. His ability to finish off opponents quickly makes him very effective against weaker opposing heroes.
hero.hero_weakness:
Hanzo ML Weaknesses
Lack of Crowd Control Skills
One of Hanzo's weaknesses is his lack of crowd control skills. Even though he has 6 skills, none of them are able to provide a significant crowd-control effect on his enemies.

Low Durability
Hanzo has a low level of endurance, which makes him easily injured by enemy attacks. This makes him have to play very carefully in every battle.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Mathilda is the best hero to pair with Hanzo because she helps him stay safe while playing aggressively. Her skill Guiding Wind lets Hanzo reposition or escape if enemies try to find his real body. This is important because Hanzo's biggest weakness is getting caught when his Hanekage form ends. Mathilda also gives a shield and movement boost, helping Hanzo move better and avoid danger. Her Circling Eagle locks down enemies, making it easier for Hanzo to finish them. Since Hanzo needs to eliminate enemies quickly, Mathilda's control makes sure they cannot escape. With her support, Hanzo can attack freely, secure kills, and survive longer, making her the best hero to pair with him.

counters.counter_desc: Yin is a strong counter to revamped Hanzo because of his ability to isolate and eliminate enemies. His Ultimate My Turn pulls Hanzo into his domain, forcing him into a one on one fight where he cannot escape or rely on his Hanekage form. This completely shuts down Hanzo's long range playstyle and makes him extremely vulnerable. Since Yin excels in duels, he can easily burst Hanzo down before he can react. Additionally, Yin's high mobility and damage allow him to hunt down Hanzo's real body if he tries to position aggressively. A well played Yin can consistently disrupt Hanzo and prevent him from safely engaging in fights.

Harley is a strong counter to revamped Hanzo because of his high burst damage and mobility. His Deadly Magic ultimate applies a burn effect that deals massive damage over time, making it difficult for Hanzo to survive, especially if he is forced back to his real body. Harley's Space Escape allows him to easily reposition and avoid Hanzo's attacks, while his Poker Trick rapidly reduces Hanzo's health from a safe distance. Since Hanzo relies on positioning and safety, Harley's ability to dive in, deal damage, and escape quickly makes it hard for Hanzo to play aggressively. A well played Harley can constantly pressure Hanzo, forcing him to play defensively and limiting his impact in fights.

dominants.dominant_desc: Revamped Hanzo's battle stage evolves through the early, mid, and late game, requiring different strategies to maximize his impact. In the early game, Hanzo should focus on fast jungle clearing using his passive to consume jungle monsters quickly, allowing him to farm efficiently and secure buffs. With Sky Piercer as his first core item, he gains an early power spike, enabling him to invade the enemy jungle or assist lanes using Hanekage while keeping his real body safe. In the mid-game, Hanzo becomes a serious threat with items like Hunters Strike and Blade of Despair, allowing him to burst down squishy targets and secure objectives such as Turtle and Lord. He should prioritize eliminating enemy damage dealers while maintaining proper energy management to avoid getting caught when returning to his real body. As the late game approaches, Hanzo must play more cautiously since enemies will have full builds and better defenses. Malefic Roar helps him deal with tanky opponents, while Immortality provides extra survivability in case he gets caught. Positioning and map awareness are crucial at this stage, as a single mistake can cost the game. Hanzo should focus on assassinating key targets, securing objectives, and ensuring his team has vision on enemy threats before engaging.
dominants.dominant_title: Revamped Hanzo's playstyle changes throughout the game. In the early game, he should focus on fast jungle clearing with his passive and secure buffs. With Sky Piercer, he gains an early power spike to

emblems.emblem_desc: I chose the Assassin Emblem for revamped Hanzo because it enhances his damage output, making him more effective at eliminating enemies while maintaining sustain. Rupture in the first tier provides physical penetration, which is crucial for dealing more damage, especially in the early game when enemies have low defense. Weapon Master in the second tier increases the bonus physical attack Hanzo gains from items and emblems, maximizing his burst potential and overall damage scaling. For the core talent, Killing Spree is the best choice as it restores HP and grants movement speed after securing a kill, allowing Hanzo to reposition or escape safely. This emblem setup ensures he can farm efficiently, burst down enemies quickly, and stay mobile in fights.

equips.equip_desc: This build for revamped Hanzo focuses on maximizing his early-game power, burst damage, and sustain while maintaining mobility and survivability. Flame Retribution is essential for faster jungle clearing and stealing movement speed from enemies, helping Hanzo secure objectives and chase down targets. Swift Boots increases his attack speed, allowing him to deal more damage in Hanekage form. Sky Piercer is chosen as the first core item because it provides early-game spell vamp, physical attack, and penetration, giving Hanzo a strong power spike to dominate fights early on. Hunters Strike follows up with cooldown reduction, physical attack, and bonus movement speed after dealing damage, making it easier for Hanzo to reposition or escape. Blade of Despair boosts his burst potential by increasing damage against low-health enemies, making his assassinations more effective. Malefic Roar ensures he can penetrate high-defense enemies, allowing him to remain a threat even against tanks. Finally, Immortality adds survivability by reviving him after death, reducing the risk of being easily punished when caught. This build balances damage, sustain, and mobility, ensuring Hanzo can dominate both early and late-game fights.

hero.hero_overview: Hanzo is a jungle-focused assassin in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, known for his ability to unleashed Ultimate form, a powerful spirit form that allows him to attack from a distance while his real body remains hidden. His revamped skills provide improved mobility, sustained burst damage, and better survivability, making him a deadly threat in the right hands. With his fast jungle clearing and strong objective control, Hanzo can quickly gain an advantage and pressure enemies across the map. However, mastering him requires precise energy management, map awareness, and strategic positioning to fully utilize his potential while minimizing risks.
hero.hero_strength: Hanzo's revamp has significantly improved his strengths, making him a more effective assassin in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang. His ability to clear jungle camps quickly allows him to farm efficiently and secure an early lead. With his revamped skill set, he deals high burst damage while maintaining sustained attacks, making him a serious threat in fights. His unique ability to attack from a long range using Ultimate form lets him pressure enemies without exposing his real body to danger. Additionally, his improved mobility helps him engage, reposition, or escape more effectively. He also excels in objective control, quickly securing buffs, Turtle, and Lord for his team. Lastly, his ultimate now provides brief immunity when Ultimate form is defeated, improving his survivability and giving him a chance to reposition safely.
hero.hero_weakness: Revamped Hanzo still has notable weaknesses that require careful play and strategic positioning. Although his real body is now invincible while using Hanekage, he still faces high risks if enemies track his location and wait for his ultimate to end. Poor energy management can also be a major issue, as failing to secure kills or assists will shorten Hanekage's duration, limiting his impact in fights. Additionally, while Hanzo has improved mobility, he remains vulnerable to crowd control effects that can disrupt his attacks and force him into bad situations. He also relies heavily on jungle farming to stay strong, meaning aggressive invades or early-game pressure can slow down his momentum and weaken his effectiveness in mid-to-late-game fights.

data.recommend: If you want to master revamped Hanzo, this guide will help you understand his playstyle, best builds, emblem setup, battle strategy, and ideal teammates.

spell.spell_desc: Revamped Hanzo needs to use Retribution because it enhances his jungle efficiency, objective control, and overall impact in the game. His playstyle heavily relies on fast farming to maintain his energy for Hanekage, and Retribution allows him to clear jungle camps even faster. Since Hanzo excels at securing objectives like buffs, Turtle, and Lord, having Retribution ensures he can out-secure enemies and maintain dominance in the jungle. Upgrading to Ice or Flame Retribution also provides additional advantages, such as slowing enemies or dealing extra damage, making it easier for Hanzo to chase down targets or escape dangerous situations. Without Retribution, his farm speed and ability to contest key objectives would be significantly weaker, reducing his effectiveness as a jungler.

hero.hero_overview: Hanzo is a long range Assassin who must land skill shots from precise angles in order to deal damage effectively.He excels in areas that have many terrains features,where his abilities grant exceptional vision utility and allow him to keep track of enemy movement beyond the fog of war.one of his main strengths is being one of the few range Assassin that are able to start fights, though.
hero.hero_strength: Hanzo can poke from very long range and strong basic attack and he has access to good sustain damage or burst damage.hanzo has a reliable escape and his heroics abilities are good follow up and engage tools.
hero.hero_weakness: Somewhat locked into the build paths after level 1 talent choice and limited usefulness of basic abilities without talent and no self sustain and very squishy .

spell.spell_desc:
Deals 520(+80*hero level) true damage to a creeps and minion and creep reward are increased by 60%and damage taken from basics creeps to reduced by 50 percent.minion rewards are reduced by 70 percent for the first five minutes.
Reach  5 Creeps kills ,hero kills, hero kull assist to level up this skill (the skill decided by the blessing of the jungling footwear purchase) reaching 15 increase physical attack and magic power by 15.
